text:
1 in 1st digit = Non-Preferred Brand 
1 in 2nd digit = Generic 
1 in 3rd digit = Preferred Generic 
1 in 4th digit = Non-Preferred Generic 
1 in 5th digit = Brand 
1 in 6th digit = Preferred Brand 

For 2018+ data — this is a binary character string where the digits are 1 or 0. 
1 in the 1st (leftmost) digit = Brand 
1 in the 2nd (right) digit = Generic 

COMMENT: There are a different number of records for each year to describe tiers, due to variation in the number 
of formulary tiers over
